metadata.regulator: National Cybersecurity Authority (NCA), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Controls selected for AI/LLM relevance — these are the subdomains and controls Dir3 evaluates AI deployments against. The full ECC has 114 controls; we focus on those most likely triggered by LLM/AI systems. Not all controls apply to every AI deployment — applicability depends on the entity type and use case.

controls.ai_relevance: AI APIs (e.g., Dir3 Proxy customers' applications) must implement strong authentication, MFA for admin access, role-based access control, and secure key management. API keys for LLM access require lifecycle management.
key_requirements_ar: مصادقة قوية للوصول إلى أنظمة AI
detection_rules: Check if MFA is enforced for admin accounts
Check if API keys have rotation policy
Check if least-privilege principle is applied
Check for shared/generic accounts (anti-pattern)
common_violations_ar: لا يوجد MFA على لوحة التحكم
common_violations_en: Open access permissions for all staff

controls.ai_relevance: Critical for AI: classification of data fed to/from LLMs, data leakage prevention, redaction of sensitive content, and secure handling throughout the AI pipeline.
key_requirements_ar: معالجة آمنة للبيانات في pipeline الـAI
ضوابط على إخراج البيانات من النموذج
key_requirements_en: Classification of data fed to AI
detection_rules: PII redaction must be in place before logging
DLP scanning must be applied to AI outputs
Sensitive data classification must guide AI handling
Sample conversations should not contain unredacted PII
common_violations_ar: logs الـAI تحتوي PII غير منقّحة
لا يوجد تصنيف للبيانات قبل إرسالها للنموذج
النموذج يكشف بيانات حساسة في الإجابات
common_violations_en: No data classification before sending to model
Model leaks sensitive data in responses

controls.ai_relevance: AI systems must encrypt data in transit (TLS to LLM endpoints) and at rest (audit logs, conversation history, API keys). Strong cryptographic standards required.
key_requirements_ar: تشفير مفاتيح API في قاعدة البيانات (Argon2id hashing)
detection_rules: All API endpoints must use HTTPS
Database encryption at rest must be enabled
API keys must be hashed, not stored plaintext
Cryptographic libraries must be up to date
common_violations_ar: نقل البيانات عبر HTTP غير مشفر

controls.subdomain_title_ar: إدارة سجلات الأحداث ومراقبة الأمن السيبراني
controls.subdomain_title_en: Cybersecurity Event Logs and Monitoring Management
controls.ai_relevance: AI systems must log all security-relevant events: authentication, blocked requests, detected attacks, PII redactions, anomalous behavior. Logs must be retained, monitored, and tamper-evident. Dir3 Proxy's audit_log is designed for this.
key_requirements_ar: احتفاظ بالسجلات لمدة لا تقل عن 12 شهراً
detection_rules: Audit log must capture: auth events, blocks, PII detections, errors
Log retention period must meet 12-month minimum
Logs must be append-only or cryptographically signed
Alert workflow must trigger on high-severity events
common_violations_ar: لا يوجد نظام تنبيه للأحداث الحرجة
common_violations_en: No alerting system for critical events

controls.ai_relevance: AI systems must have incident response procedures for: data leakage via prompt injection, model abuse, API key compromise, mass exfiltration attempts. Detection, response, and recovery workflows required.
detection_rules: Incident response plan must exist and be tested
Detection capabilities for AI-specific threats (prompt injection, mass exfiltration)
Webhook integration for incident escalation
Communication plan for affected stakeholders
common_violations_ar: لا يوجد كشف لـprompt injection attacks
common_violations_en: No detection for prompt injection attacks

controls.ai_relevance: AI APIs are web applications. They must follow OWASP Top 10 for traditional web threats AND OWASP Top 10 for LLMs (prompt injection, training data poisoning, output handling). Dir3 specifically addresses LLM-specific web security.
key_requirements_ar: حماية ضد OWASP LLM Top 10 (إضافي للـAI)
detection_rules: Standard web security headers (HSTS, CSP, etc.) must be set
Rate limiting must be in place
Input validation against injection
LLM-specific: prompt injection detection (Dir3 provides)
LLM-specific: output sanitization for PII
common_violations_ar: لا توجد حماية ضد prompt injection

controls.ai_relevance: CRITICAL for AI: using foreign LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) means relying on third parties for processing. ECC requires: vendor risk assessment, contractual cybersecurity obligations, monitoring of third-party security posture, NDA clauses.
key_requirements_ar: مراقبة دورية لوضع الأمن لدى المزود
خطة الخروج في حالة فسخ العقد
key_requirements_en: Periodic monitoring of provider security posture
Exit plan in case of contract termination
detection_rules: DPA / cybersecurity agreement must exist with each LLM provider
Vendor risk assessment documented
Provider security certifications verified (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
Termination procedures defined

controls.ai_relevance: CRITICAL: ECC mandates cloud cybersecurity managed service centers be conducted exclusively in the Kingdom for sensitive contexts. AI deployments using foreign cloud (AWS US, Azure US) need careful evaluation. Saudi-hosted alternatives (e.g., Saudi Cloud) recommended for sensitive workloads.
key_requirements_ar: اعتماد ضوابط الحوسبة السحابية الخاصة بالـNCA
إدارة الخدمات السحابية الحساسة من داخل المملكة
ضوابط فصل البيانات في البيئات السحابية المشتركة
key_requirements_en: Adopt NCA Cloud Computing Cybersecurity Controls (CCC)
Sensitive cloud services managed from within KSA
Data segregation controls in shared cloud environments
detection_rules: If sensitive data: hosting region must be assessed
Cloud provider compliance with KSA-specific requirements
Tenant isolation guarantees
Region-specific data residency configuration
common_violations_ar: استضافة بيانات حساسة خارج المملكة بدون تقييم
common_violations_en: Sensitive data hosted outside KSA without assessment

controls.ai_relevance: AI systems require continuous vulnerability assessment including LLM-specific issues: prompt injection susceptibility, training data leaks, jailbreak resistance. Dir3 Playground provides this assessment capability.
detection_rules: Vulnerability scanning schedule must exist
LLM-specific testing (using tools like Dir3 Playground) must be performed
Remediation SLAs must be defined
Process for emerging AI threats

controls.ai_relevance: Annual penetration testing required. For AI systems, this should include LLM red-teaming: prompt injection campaigns, jailbreak attempts, data exfiltration tests. Dir3 provides automated testing for ongoing coverage between annual pentests.
detection_rules: Annual pentest must be documented
AI red-team must include prompt injection, jailbreaks, data exfiltration
Critical findings must have remediation timeline
Pentest scope must include AI components
